plugins.name: hyperframes
plugins.description: HyperFrames by HeyGen. Write HTML, render video. Compositions, GSAP and runtime adapter animations, captions, voiceovers, audio-reactive visuals, and website-to-video capture for HyperFrames.

plugins.name: core-skills
plugins.description: The always-needed HyperFrames core set: the /hyperframes router, the hyperframes-* domain skills, and media-use. The full plugin (all skills) is `hyperframes`.
